span.p:
Public Route Table
10.10.0.0/16 → local
0.0.0.0/0 → Internet Gateway

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Public Web Security Group
Inbound: HTTP 80 from Internet
Inbound: HTTPS 443 from Internet
Inbound: SSH 22 from Trusted CIDR
Outbound: All

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Private Route Table
10.10.0.0/16 → local
No Internet default route

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Private Application Security Group
Inbound: TCP 8080 from Public Web SG
Outbound: All
